title: Dongwon Lee
contact_note_global: Recent work and links are below.
contact_note_talk: LinkedIn is the easiest way to reach me. GitHub has recent code and project history.
work_hero_description: The current project list is on the home page.
resume_hero_summary: I work across frontend, API, and deployment for web services. Most of my recent work is in Typescript, SvelteKit, Nest.js, and AWS.
resume_experience_1_summary: I joined Nextbeat in April 2024. After working on Hoikushibank, I moved to Omotenashi HR.
resume_experience_1_achievement_2: Moved Lambda deployments from Serverless Framework to AWS SAM and reduced deployment time by about 30%.
resume_experience_1_achievement_3: Improved Lighthouse SEO and Core Web Vitals with SSR and asset delivery changes.
resume_experience_1_achievement_4: Migrated the internal admin tool's authentication setup from Azure AD to Amazon Cognito.
resume_experience_2_summary: I built the BiodenKR site as a short contract project.
resume_experience_2_achievement_1: Built the site in SvelteKit with a content-friendly static SSR setup.
resume_experience_2_achievement_2: Shipped five-language support without duplicating layouts.
resume_experience_2_achievement_3: Deployed it on Cloudflare Pages with automated publishing.
resume_project_1_description: Reworked Lambda deployment flows around AWS SAM and shared templates.
resume_project_2_description: Adjusted SSR, image delivery, and route loading in SvelteKit.
resume_project_2_impact: Lighthouse SEO and performance scores improved by more than 10 points.
resume_project_3_description: Built and localized a corporate site for five languages.
resume_project_3_impact: The site was published on Cloudflare Pages for global delivery.
resume_project_4_description: Moved the authentication setup from Azure AD to Amazon Cognito.
resume_project_4_impact: Simplified the authentication flow and operations on the AWS side.
